name: Almost Paradise
overview: A former DEA agent forced into early retirement runs a gift shop in in the Philippines. Despite his best efforts to begin a tranquil new life, he’s pulled back into a world of dangerous people and deadly situations, either through his friends in the local police department or running into people from his old life. And the problem is: he likes it.

trailers.title: Almost Paradise Season 2 | Official Trailer | Coming July 21
